publish.note: The post will be published immediately on Instagram
publish.confirmDescription: The post will be published immediately on Instagram. This action cannot be undone.
publish.publishingDescription: Please wait while the post is published on Instagram.

toast.processing: Post being processed by Instagram. Track on the deliveries page.

warnings.revoked: Instagram token has been revoked. Reconnect the account in the client settings.
warnings.expired: Instagram token has expired. Reconnect the account in the client settings.
warnings.missingPermission: Publish permission not granted. Reconnect the account with the required permissions.

mediaGallery.selectThumbnail: Select a thumbnail for the video
mediaGallery.thumbnailHint: Videos get an automatic thumbnail (a frame from the video). You can adjust it later via the image icon on the video.
mediaGallery.thumbnailFallback: Could not generate a thumbnail automatically. Select a cover image for
mediaGallery.carouselLimitDesc: Carousels published via Instagram allow at most {{max}} items (this post has {{count}}). The app allows 20, but automatic publishing is limited to {{max}}.

thumbnailEditor.title: Video thumbnail
thumbnailEditor.disclaimer: This thumbnail becomes the Reel's cover on Instagram and appears in the CRM and client portal previews. (For carousels, Instagram uses the first item as the cover.)
